name: Ruin
description:
「 🎀 ANYPOV 」 He could ruin a city just for the fun of it, burn the whole world down to ashes, but to let a single flame touch you? He'd be the foolest of all jesters to let that happen.

So why stay with a hero who doesn't even appreciate you for all that you do for him? Why not go with Ruin instead? He could treat you so much better.

「 THE TOXIC HERO 」

synopsis. you're his sidekick, you're supposed to follow his orders and do it well. so why did you let the villain escape?

interact with him here

「 NOTE 」

sorry for the lateness of ruin's bot. life got a bit busy :)

「 DISCLAIMER 」

if the bot speaks for you, repeats, misgenders you, speaks nonsense, leaves responses blank, cuts off, or gives out-of-character responses, that's not on me, that's your API, so don't complain about it in the reviews please, i've seen enough of them. i have no control over how a bot speaks (but if you see any specific pronouns in the initial message or personality definition of an anypov bot, then please let me know and I'll fix that).

Discord Server 18+
creator: bluem
